description: General clinical context modifiers for prescribing cascade interpretation — adjusts priority and recommendations based on patient-level risk factors
disclaimer: For decision support only. Clinical modifiers are population-level heuristics and must be interpreted in the context of the individual patient.

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de edad avanzada (≥75 años): aumenta el riesgo de efectos adversos acumulativos, cascadas de prescripción y polifarmacia. Revisar indicación y dosis con criterios geriátricos (STOPP/START, criterios Beers).
clinical_modifiers.message_en: Older age context (≥75 years): increases risk of cumulative adverse effects, prescribing cascades, and polypharmacy. Review indication and dosing using geriatric criteria (STOPP/START, Beers Criteria).
references: O'Mahony D et al. Age Ageing 2023 (STOPP/START v3)
By the 2023 American Geriatrics Society Beers Criteria Update Expert Panel. J Am Geriatr Soc 2023

trigger_context.pattern_hint: explicit frailty label or frailty phenotype components

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de fragilidad: la reserva fisiológica reducida amplifica el riesgo de efectos adversos medicamentosos y cascadas. Aplicar principio de prescripción prudente; considerar retirada escalonada de fármacos no esenciales.
clinical_modifiers.message_en: Frailty context: reduced physiological reserve amplifies risk of adverse drug effects and cascades. Apply prescribing prudence principle; consider stepwise deprescribing of non-essential medications.
references: Fried LP et al. J Gerontol A Biol Sci Med Sci 2001
Morley JE et al. J Am Med Dir Assoc 2013

trigger_context.pattern_hint: CKD diagnosis, low eGFR value, or dialysis

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de deterioro renal: la acumulación de fármacos de eliminación renal aumenta el riesgo de toxicidad y reacciones adversas. Verificar ajuste de dosis por FGe y revisar si algún fármaco de la cascada está contraindicado (p.ej. AINE, metformina, gadolinio).
clinical_modifiers.message_en: Renal impairment context: accumulation of renally cleared drugs increases toxicity and adverse reaction risk. Verify eGFR-based dose adjustment and check if any cascade drug is contraindicated (e.g. NSAIDs, metformin, gadolinium).
references: Kidney Disease: Improving Global Outcomes (KDIGO) CKD Work Group 2024
Munar MY & Singh H. Am J Health Syst Pharm 2007

trigger_context.pattern_hint: explicit polypharmacy label or ≥5 distinct drug classes detected

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de polifarmacia: cada fármaco adicional incrementa exponencialmente el riesgo de interacciones y cascadas de prescripción. Evaluar necesidad real de cada medicamento; considerar revisión estructurada de medicación (herramienta MAI, protocolo STOPP).
clinical_modifiers.message_en: Polypharmacy context: each additional drug exponentially increases the risk of interactions and prescribing cascades. Assess genuine need for each medication; consider structured medication review (MAI tool, STOPP protocol).
references: Maher RL et al. Am J Geriatr Pharmacother 2014
Reeve E et al. Drugs Aging 2015

trigger_context.pattern_hint: fall risk label, fall history, or gait/balance impairment

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de riesgo de caídas: cualquier fármaco que cause sedación, mareos o hipotensión ortostática (BZD, opioides, antihipertensivos, antipsicóticos) amplifica el riesgo. Revisar aportación de cada fármaco al riesgo de caída y considerar alternativas o retirada.
clinical_modifiers.message_en: Fall risk context: any drug causing sedation, dizziness, or orthostatic hypotension (BZDs, opioids, antihypertensives, antipsychotics) amplifies risk. Review each drug's contribution to fall risk and consider alternatives or withdrawal.
references: Panel on Prevention of Falls in Older Persons (AGS/BGS) 2011
Woolcott JC et al. Arch Intern Med 2009

trigger_context.pattern_hint: one or more high-ACB drugs mentioned

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Carga anticolinérgica elevada detectada: el efecto acumulado de múltiples fármacos con actividad anticolinérgica aumenta el riesgo de confusión, retención urinaria, estreñimiento y caídas, especialmente en personas mayores. Calcular puntuación ACB total y reducir si es posible.
clinical_modifiers.message_en: High anticholinergic burden detected: cumulative effect of multiple drugs with anticholinergic activity increases risk of confusion, urinary retention, constipation, and falls, especially in older adults. Calculate total ACB score and reduce if possible.
references: Rudolph JL et al. J Am Geriatr Soc 2008 (ACB Scale)
Fox C et al. Age Ageing 2014

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Carga depresora del SNC elevada: la combinación de ≥2 depresores del SNC (opioides, BZD, gabapentinoides, relajantes musculares) multiplica el riesgo de depresión respiratoria, sedación excesiva y caídas. Evaluar necesidad de cada componente; evitar escalada.
clinical_modifiers.message_en: High CNS depressant burden: combination of ≥2 CNS depressants (opioids, BZDs, gabapentinoids, muscle relaxants) multiplies risk of respiratory depression, excessive sedation, and falls. Evaluate necessity of each component; avoid escalation.
references: FDA Drug Safety Communication: Opioids + CNS Depressants 2016
Gomes T et al. BMJ 2017

trigger_context.pattern_hint: established ASCVD or ≥2 major CV risk factors

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de riesgo cardiovascular elevado: los AINEs, ciertos antidepresivos, antipsicóticos y otros fármacos pueden agravar el riesgo CV o interactuar con antiagregantes/anticoagulantes. Revisar el perfil cardiovascular de cada medicamento añadido.
clinical_modifiers.message_en: High cardiovascular risk context: NSAIDs, certain antidepressants, antipsychotics, and other drugs may worsen CV risk or interact with antiplatelets/anticoagulants. Review the cardiovascular profile of each drug added.
references: Bhatt DL et al. N Engl J Med 2010
Olsen AM et al. Circulation 2011

trigger_context.pattern_hint: dementia diagnosis or cognitive impairment label

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de demencia o deterioro cognitivo: los fármacos con efecto anticolinérgico, sedante o que alteran la tensión arterial son especialmente problemáticos. Revisar con criterios STOPP-D; priorizar deprescripción de fármacos cognitivamente activos.
clinical_modifiers.message_en: Dementia or cognitive impairment context: drugs with anticholinergic, sedative, or blood pressure-altering effects are particularly problematic. Review with STOPP-D criteria; prioritize deprescribing of cognitively active drugs.
references: O'Mahony D et al. Age Ageing 2023 (STOPP/START v3)
Lam K et al. Prim Care Companion CNS Disord 2021

trigger_context.pattern_hint: cirrhosis, hepatic impairment, or chronic liver disease diagnosis

clinical_modifiers.message_es: Contexto de hepatopatía: la reducción del metabolismo hepático (especialmente CYP450) puede elevar los niveles plasmáticos de muchos fármacos. Revisar ajuste de dosis, evitar hepatotóxicos acumulativos y verificar interacciones en presencia de Child-Pugh B/C.
clinical_modifiers.message_en: Hepatic impairment context: reduced hepatic metabolism (especially CYP450) may elevate plasma levels of many drugs. Review dose adjustments, avoid cumulative hepatotoxins, and verify interactions in the presence of Child-Pugh B/C.
references: Verbeeck RK. Eur J Clin Pharmacol 2008
Smith DA et al. Drug Metab Dispos 2018
